title: ArcFlow Runtime Contract Specification v0.1 (APPROVED 2026-05-26)
description: RCS v0.1 — machine contract between language SDKs and arcflow-core. Matches arcflow_sprint01.md §8. Week 3 gate: Chief Architecture Agent marked this schema APPROVED on 2026-05-26. Breaking changes require a MAJOR version bump; additive changes use MINOR per CONTRIBUTING RCS policy.

Uuid.description: RFC 4122 identifier. Used on all entity ids and trace correlation.

DateTimeUtc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp on envelopes and trace events.

MessageType.description: Envelope dispatch label. Sprint 2+ all SDK traffic.

ExecutionStatus.description: Workflow or step lifecycle state. Sprint 2 execution, Sprint 5 traces.

ErrorCode.description: Stable machine-readable error code in ErrorPayload. Sprint 7+ error handling.

MemoryType.description: Memory backend kind on AgentDefinition. Sprint 4 memory subsystem.

TraceEventKind.description: Observability event classification. Sprint 5 tracing engine.

ProviderId.description: LLM provider identifier on ProviderConfig. Sprint 6 providers.

RetryPolicy.description: Retry limits for workflow or step failures. Sprint 7 retry engine.

max_attempts.description: Total attempts including the first run. Sprint 7.

backoff_ms.description: Initial backoff delay in milliseconds. Sprint 7.

max_backoff_ms.description: Upper bound on backoff delay in milliseconds. Sprint 7.

ttl_seconds.description: Optional TTL for memory entries in seconds. Sprint 4.

ToolDefinition.description: External tool exposed to an agent. Sprint 4 tool runtime.

name.description: Tool name used for dispatch. Sprint 4.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing tool inputs. Sprint 4.

permissions.description: Permission strings required to invoke the tool. Sprint 4.

ProviderConfig.description: LLM provider settings for a run. Sprint 6.

model.description: Model id passed to the provider API. Sprint 6.

api_key_env.description: Environment variable holding the API key. Sprint 6.

AgentDefinition.description: Agent role and capabilities referenced by workflow steps. Sprint 2–6.

name.description: Human-readable agent name. Sprint 2–3 SDK binding.

role.description: Role label used in prompts. Sprint 2–3.

instructions.description: System or task instructions. Sprint 2–3, Sprint 6 provider calls.

tools.description: Tools available to the agent. Sprint 4.

StepDefinition.description: Ordered step within a workflow. Sprint 2 execution.

agent_id.description: Agent that executes this step. Sprint 2–3.

fallback_step_id.description: Optional fallback step on failure. Sprint 7.

approval_key.description: Stable key scoped to the run for approval requests.

timeout_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds before the approval expires.

interrupt.description: When true, checkpoint and return Interrupted instead of blocking.

ExecutionMode.description: Workflow execution strategy. linear = ordered steps; graph = DAG with conditional edges. Phase 1.1.

GraphNode.description: Node in a graph workflow referencing a StepDefinition. Phase 1.1.

inputs.description: Optional input state keys for this node.

outputs.description: Optional output state keys for this node.
